betterquesting:10.desc:8:
Upon closer inspection, the growing flesh the botanists were studying in Gallifrey is the same that can be found underground in Terra.
That one, though has entered some sort of dormant state, if I had to guess, likely induced by the Arbiter or its faithful.
A magic command of some sort seems to hold back the humgering flesh on Terra. I do not understand this magic, so unfortunately I cannot replicate it yet.
Unlike the Abyss World Soul, thankfully, the flesh monstruosity of the Meatball Man will not work on Terra. 
The existence of this growing flesh is quite concerning. The meatball man possesses a weapon that could be even more devastating than taint, a world ender.
The Arbiter and his Faithful knew of this, and were ready for it. Their plan, alas, was never concluded. But I have the missing knowledge, I possess what is necessary to finally banish the powers of Gluttony from Terra.
